articles.title: New Open-Source LLM Beats GPT-4 on Coding Benchmarks
articles.summary: A 70B parameter open-source model fine-tuned on code outperforms GPT-4 on HumanEval and MBPP benchmarks while running on a single A100 GPU. Weights and training code are on HuggingFace under Apache 2.0.

articles.title: Anthropic Releases Claude's Extended Thinking API
articles.summary: Anthropic launched extended thinking mode for Claude, surfacing chain-of-thought reasoning as structured output. Developers can now access thinking tokens directly for debugging and transparency workflows.

articles.title: The Hidden Costs of Microservices at Small Scale
articles.summary: A post-mortem from a 15-person startup: 6 months of velocity loss, 3x infrastructure costs, and a return to a modular monolith after a failed microservices migration. Includes a framework for deciding when microservices make sense.

articles.title: Bun 2.0 Released with Native TypeScript Decorators and 40% Faster Bundler
articles.summary: Bun 2.0 ships with native TypeScript decorator support, 40% faster bundler, built-in test coverage reporting, and a new lock file format. Fully backwards-compatible with 1.x.

articles.title: Vercel Acquires Tremor — React Component Library for Dashboards
articles.summary: Vercel acquired Tremor, the open-source React component library for analytics dashboards, integrating it into the v0 component generation platform. Stays MIT-licensed.

articles.title: Fly.io Launches Persistent Volumes with Point-in-Time Recovery
articles.summary: Fly.io added PITR to persistent volumes — restore to any second in the past 7 days. Priced at $0.15/GB/month for snapshot storage.

articles.title: Ask HN: What's Your Current Agentic AI Stack?
articles.summary: Popular HN thread on production agentic AI stacks. Key themes: Claude + tool use, LangGraph for orchestration, and preference for deterministic pipelines over fully autonomous agents.

articles.title: Postgres 18 Preview: Vectorized Query Execution
articles.summary: Postgres 18 dev branch adds experimental vectorized query execution with 3-5x speedup on analytical queries. Opt-in via GUC setting, no OLTP regression.
